study.title: The transcriptome of Colletotrichum sublineola during in vitro culture
study.description: This data set serves as a reference that can be used to identify Colletotrichum sublineola transcripts that are specific to the interaction with the plant host sorghum (Sorghum bicolor. (L.) Moench)

attributes.isolation_source: Sorghum bicolor from Live Oak, FL
attributes.biomaterial_provider: W. Vermerris, University of Florida, PO Box 103610, Gainesville, FL 32611
attributes.env_broad_scale: in vitro culture on potato dextrose agar
